name: Savory Rice Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 2 (10 oz) packages Green Giant Rice Originals
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice according to package directions.
2. In a large saucepan, sauté onion and celery in margarine until tender.
3. Add water and stuffing mix; stir in cooked rice, tossing lightly.
4. Use to stuff a Merrie Crown Roast of Pork.
This is a tasty bread and rice stuffing with mushrooms. TIP: If desired, stuffing can be baked separately in a lightly buttered 2-quart casserole at 350°F for 30-40 minutes.
